page.title: NCM Function Model Lab
page.description: A NiceChunk lab that loads VOX models, maps colors to a shared palette, emits compact on-chain function bytes, and redraws the model from that payload.

hero.title: Load a VOX model and redraw it from a function

tech.title: Technical idea
tech.body: The function payload stores only G0 palette indexes and box-basis bytes. Later miners can use the exact model hash as the target and search for a shorter Fourier gene.

static.title: Documentation-only review
static.body: This environment cannot prove the GPU workload. Use this panel as the static display: it shows the intended workflow, review boundary, and deferred runtime evidence without claiming screenshots or benchmark results.
static.evidenceValue: README, showcase docs, HTML controls, codec path, parser boundary
static.deferredValue: WebGL fidelity, frame stability, proof-search speed, screenshots
static.securityValue: No upload endpoint, wallet signing, server address, token, or deploy script

steps.sample: Load VOX and canonicalize its voxel/color grid.
steps.fit: Map colors to the shared G0 palette and merge same-color voxels into box basis functions.
steps.rebuild: Evaluate the function bytes and redraw the model from G0 palette indexes.
steps.bake: Use the exact result hash as a future PoW target for shorter genes.

formula.title: On-chain function data
formula.empty: Drop a VOX file, then click Compute function.

algorithm.title: Original algorithm
algorithm.empty: Compute a function to show its decoder algorithm.

pow.title: PoW expression search
pow.empty: Load a VOX model, then start local PoW.
pow.started: target={hash}, voxels={voxels}; searching seed expressions locally
pow.bestLog: best seed={seed} iou={score} hit={hit}/{union} bytes={bytes} proof={proof} expr={expr}
